eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Emery, UT; at 9:33 AM on JUN 14, 2026 Effective until 7:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Possible heavy rainfall and excessive runoff may result in flooding of rivers, creeks, streams and other low-lying locations. Slot canyons are highly susceptible to flash flooding. Avoid canyons, washes and low-lying terrain
